title: acrostichum repandum var. quoyanum
intro: Acrostichum repandum var. quoyanum, also known as the Quoy's leathery fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Marattiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acrostichum repandum var. quoyanum include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat conditions such as bronchitis and asthma.
